violations.text: The walk-in gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. The walk-in freezer was observed out of order. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the chip isle have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025
The dumpster area was observed with an accumulation of debris. Dumpster areas must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025

The outside area by the propane station and single trash can has an accumulation of soil residue and an accumulation of large droppings. The outside of the establishment must be maintained and inspected for any pests. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigeration shelving have an accumulation of milk residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024

The floors in the dry storage area have litter, soil residue and other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024
